recommendations.title: Daniel & Ana
recommendations.overview: Being kidnapped shatters a brother and sister's harmony, forcing them to confront their desires.

recommendations.title: After Lucia
recommendations.overview: Alejandra and her dad Roberto have just moved to town. She is new at school, he has a new job. Starting over is sometimes complicated when you have left so much behind.

recommendations.title: New Order
recommendations.overview: In the near future, a popular uprising in Mexico City interrupts a wedding held at the home of a wealthy family. After the riots have been quashed, they discover the bride has gone missing and plea with the military to help locate her.

recommendations.title: Memory

recommendations.title: The Croods: A New Age
recommendations.overview: Searching for a safer habitat, the prehistoric Crood family discovers an idyllic, walled-in paradise that meets all of its needs. Unfortunately, they must also learn to live with the Bettermans -- a family that's a couple of steps above the Croods on

recommendations.title: Ne Zha 2
recommendations.overview: After a catastrophic event leaves their bodies destroyed, Ne Zha and Ao Bing are granted a fragile second chance at life. As tensions rise between the dragon clans and celestial forces, the two must undergo a series of perilous trials that will test

recommendations.title: O.J.: Made in America
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the rise and fall of O.J. Simpson, whose high-profile murder trial exposed the extent of American racial tensions, revealing a fractured and divided nation.

recommendations.title: Speak No Evil
recommendations.overview: When an American family is invited to spend the weekend at the idyllic country estate of a charming British family they befriended on vacation, what begins as a dream holiday soon warps into a snarled psychological nightmare.

recommendations.title: The Secret Garden

recommendations.title: The Voice of Hind Rajab
